ValidationRule.description: Request cannot be updated because a JIRA Issue was created. However, Notes and Comments can be added to the Request for clarification purposes.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Request_Status__c, "Submitted")), OR(ISCHANGED(Affected_PKI_Application__c), ISCHANGED(As_a__c), ISCHANGED(I_know_this_is_done_when__c), ISCHANGED(I_want_to__c), ISCHANGED(Bug_Details__c), ISCHANGED(So_that_I__c)), AND($Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", $Profile.Name <> "Delegated Administrator"))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_REQUEST_001: This Request was reviewed and approved. Work has begun on the Request so details cannot be changed. Although you can't make changes to the Request, you can add notes and Chatter comments for clarification purposes.
